mapper.sql: id, dept_name, parent_id, ancestors, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time
mapper.select:
SELECT FROM sys_department
AND dept_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{deptName}, '%')
AND status = #{status}
ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT FROM sys_department ORDER BY sort_order ASC, create_time ASC
SELECT FROM sys_department WHERE parent_id = #{parentId} AND dept_name = #{deptName} LIMIT 1
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_department (dept_name, parent_id, ancestors, sort_order, status, create_time, update_time) VALUES (#{deptName}, #{parentId, jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{ancestors}, #{sortOrder, jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{status, jdbcType=INTEGER}, NOW(), NOW())
